CVE-2020-27799.title: A heap-based buffer over-read was discovered in the acc_ua_get_be ...
CVE-2020-27799.description: A heap-based buffer over-read was discovered in the acc_ua_get_be32 function in miniacc.h in UPX 4.0.0 via a crafted Mach-O file.

CVE-2020-27800.title: A heap-based buffer over-read was discovered in the get_le32 func ...
CVE-2020-27800.description: A heap-based buffer over-read was discovered in the get_le32 function in bele.h in UPX 4.0.0 via a crafted Mach-O file.

CVE-2021-20285.title: A flaw was found in upx canPack in p_lx_elf.cpp in UPX 3.96. This ...
CVE-2021-20285.description: A flaw was found in upx canPack in p_lx_elf.cpp in UPX 3.96. This flaw allows attackers to cause a denial of service (SEGV or buffer overflow and application crash) or possibly have unspecified other impacts via a crafted ELF. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to system availability.

CVE-2023-23457.title: A Segmentation fault was found in UPX in PackLinuxElf64::invert_p ...
CVE-2023-23457.description: A Segmentation fault was found in UPX in PackLinuxElf64::invert_pt_dynamic() in p_lx_elf.cpp. An attacker with a crafted input file allows invalid memory address access that could lead to a denial of service.
